description:
Catalog schema for Beckn Protocol v2.0.0

This schema is part of the Long Term Support of Beckn Protocol V2.0 API specification and MUST NOT be extended. Any domain-specific extension must use the property of this schema which is of type Attribute.
title: Catalog

bppId.description: BPP (Beckn Protocol Provider) identifier that publishes this catalog

bppUri.description: Beckn Protocol API base URL of the BPP

publishDirectives.description: Directives controlling publish behavior for master/regular catalog flow. Deprecated and planned for removal in a future release.

catalogType.description: master = canonical source catalog; regular = seller/provider extension catalog

updateMode.description: Used for regular updates. FULL replaces overlay; MERGE applies JSON Merge Patch semantics.

resourceDirectives.description: Optional per-resource extension mapping for regular catalogs

resourceId.description: Seller/provider resource identifier in this catalog

masterResourceId.description: Canonical master resource identifier being extended

descriptor.description: Human / Agent-readable description of this catalog

offers.description: Array of offers optionally linked to resources

resources.description: Array of generalized Resource entities in this catalog (new model)

validity.description: The time period during which this catalog is valid
